name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES state, label, maxLabel

(* State of each process: 0 = idle, 1 = trying, 2 = critical *)
State == [p \in 1..N |-> 0..2]

(* Label for each process *)
Label == [p \in 1..N |-> Nat]

(* Maximum label used *)
MaxLabel == 0

(* Initial state: all idle, no labels *)
Init == /\ state = [p \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ label = [p \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ maxLabel = 0

(* Helper: set of processes in critical section *)
InCritical == {p \in 1..N : state[p] = 2}

(* Helper: set of processes trying to enter critical section *)
Trying == {p \in 1..N : state[p] = 1}

(* Helper: set of processes that are idle *)
Idle == {p \in 1..N : state[p] = 0}

(* Helper: set of processes that are not in critical section *)
NotInCritical == 1..N \ InCritical

(* Helper: set of processes that are not in critical section and not trying *)
NotInCriticalNotTrying == 1..N \ (InCritical \cup Trying)

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == /\ state \in [1..N -> {0,1,2}]
          /\ label \in [1..N -> Nat]
          /\ maxLabel \in Nat

(* Action: process i starts trying to enter critical section *)
StartTrying(i) == /\ i \in 1..N
                  /\ state[i] = 0
                  /\ label' = [label EXCEPT ![i] = maxLabel + 1]
                  /\ maxLabel' = maxLabel + 1
                  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = 1]

(* Action: process i enters critical section *)
EnterCritical(i) == /\ i \in 1..N
                    /\ state[i] = 1
                    /\ \A j \in 1..N : j # i => label[i] < label[j] \/ (label[i] = label[j] /\ i < j)
                    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = 2]

(* Action: process i exits critical section *)
ExitCritical(i) == /\ i \in 1..N
                  /\ state[i] = 2
                  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = 0]
                  /\ label' = [label EXCEPT ![i] = 0]

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == \E i \in 1..N : StartTrying(i) \/ EnterCritical(i) \/ ExitCritical(i)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, label, maxLabel>>

====

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Participants

(* Participant states *)
State == {"INIT", "PREPARED", "COMMITTED", "ABORTED"}

(* System state variables *)
VARIABLES participants, coordinator, messages

(* Initial state: all participants are INIT, coordinator undecided, no messages *)
Init == /\ participants = [p \in Participants |-> "INIT"]
        /\ coordinator = "PENDING"
        /\ messages = <<>>

(* Helper predicates for message types *)
PrepareMsg(p) == [type |-> "PREPARE", from |-> "COORDINATOR", to |-> p]
VoteYesMsg(p) == [type |-> "VOTE_YES", from |-> p, to |-> "COORDINATOR"]
VoteNoMsg(p) == [type |-> "VOTE_NO", from |-> p, to |-> "COORDINATOR"]
CommitMsg == [type |-> "COMMIT", from |-> "COORDINATOR", to |-> "ALL"]
AbortMsg == [type |-> "ABORT", from |-> "COORDINATOR", to |-> "ALL"]

(* Coordinator sends Prepare to all participants *)
SendPrepare == 
  /\ coordinator = "PENDING"
  /\ messages' = messages ^ [PrepareMsg(p) : p \in Participants]

(* Participant receives Prepare and votes yes *)
VoteYes(p) ==
  /\ messages \in Seq(PrepareMsg(p))
  /\ participants[p] = "INIT"
  /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![p] = "PREPARED"]
  /\ messages' = messages ^ VoteYesMsg(p)

(* Participant receives Prepare and votes no *)
VoteNo(p) ==
  /\ messages \in Seq(PrepareMsg(p))
  /\ participants[p] = "INIT"
  /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![p] = "ABORTED"]
  /\ messages' = messages ^ VoteNoMsg(p)

(* Coordinator collects votes and decides *)
Decide ==
  LET yesVotes == {p \in Participants : messages \in Seq(VoteYesMsg(p)}
      noVotes  == {p \in Participants : messages \in Seq(VoteNoMsg(p)} IN
  /\ coordinator = "PENDING"
  /\ (noVotes # {}) -> coordinator' = "ABORTED" /\ messages' = messages ^ AbortMsg
  /\ (noVotes = {}) /\ (yesVotes = Participants) -> coordinator' = "COMMITTED" /\ messages' = messages ^ CommitMsg
  /\ UNCHANGED <<participants, messages>>

(* Participants act on Commit or Abort *)
CommitAction(p) ==
  /\ messages \in Seq(CommitMsg)
  /\ participants[p] = "PREPARED"
  /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![p] = "COMMITTED"]
  /\ UNCHANGED messages

AbortAction(p) ==
  /\ messages \in Seq(AbortMsg)
  /\ participants[p] \in {"PREPARED", "INIT"}
  /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![p] = "ABORTED"]
  /\ UNCHANGED messages

(* Next-state relation *)
Next ==
  \/ SendPrepare
  \/ \E p \in Participants: VoteYes(p)
  \/ \E p \in Participants: VoteNo(p)
  \/ Decide
  \/ \E p \in Participants: CommitAction(p)
  \/ \E p \in Participants: AbortAction(p)

(* Invariant: no participant commits without coordinator's commit *)
TypeOK == 
  \A p \in Participants :
    participants[p] = "COMMITTED" => coordinator = "COMMITTED"

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<participants, coordinator, messages>>

====

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

(* Define the set of philosophers and forks *)
Philosophers == 1..N
Forks == 1..N

(* Helper to get the left and right fork for a philosopher *)
LeftFork(i) == i
RightFork(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

(* State variables *)
VARIABLES state, forks

(* State can be "thinking", "hungry", or "eating" for each philosopher *)
State == {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}

(* Initial state: all philosophers are thinking and all forks are free *)
Init == /\ state = [p \in Philosophers |-> "thinking"]
        /\ forks = [f \in Forks |-> TRUE]

(* Predicate: philosopher i can start eating (both forks free) *)
CanEat(i) == forks[LeftFork(i)] /\ forks[RightFork(i)]

(* Action: philosopher i picks up both forks and starts eating *)
TakeForks(i) ==
  /\ state[i] = "hungry"
  /\ CanEat(i)
  /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LeftFork(i)] = FALSE, ![RightFork(i)] = FALSE]
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]

(* Action: philosopher i puts down both forks and stops eating *)
PutForks(i) ==
  /\ state[i] = "eating"
  /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LeftFork(i)] = TRUE, ![RightFork(i)] = TRUE]
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

(* Action: philosopher i becomes hungry (ready to eat) *)
BecomeHungry(i) ==
  /\ state[i] = "thinking"
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
  /\ forks' = forks

(* Next-state relation: any philosopher can transition *)
Next ==
  \E i \in Philosophers :
    TakeForks(i) \/ PutForks(i) \/ BecomeHungry(i)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, forks>>

(* Invariant: no two adjacent philosophers are eating simultaneously *)
TypeOK ==
  \A i \in Philosophers :
    ~(state[i] = "eating" /\ state[IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1] = "eating")

====

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Proc
ASSUME N \in Nat
ASSUME Proc = 1..N

VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = [p \in Proc |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [p \in Proc |-> FALSE]

maxNum == MAX(num)

nextNum(p) == 1 + MAX(num)

AssignNum(p) ==
  LET n == nextNum(p) IN
  /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![p] = TRUE]
  /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![p] = n]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<num, flag>>

Release(p) ==
  /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![p] = FALSE]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<num, flag>>

Next ==
  \E p \in Proc :
    \E action \in {AssignNum, Release} :
      action(p)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFO ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K \* Queue capacity

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

(* q is a sequence of length K, head and tail are indices modulo K, size is the number of elements *)

Init == /\ q = <<>> \/ (Len(q) = K /\ q \in Seq(1..K))
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ size = 0

Producer == 
    /\ size < K
    /\ head' = %(head, K) + 1
    /\ q' = SubSeq(q, 1, head-1) \o <<1>> \o SubSeq(q, head, K-1)
    /\ size' = size + 1
    /\ UNCHANGED <<tail>>

Consumer == 
    /\ size > 0
    /\ tail' = %(tail, K) + 1
    /\ q' = SubSeq(q, 1, tail-1) \o SubSeq(q, tail+1, K)
    /\ size' = size - 1
    /\ UNCHANGED <<head>>

Next == Producer \/ Consumer

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>>

====

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N \* number of servers, N, NULL
ASSUME N \in 1..5

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state, hasn

(* State values *)
Leader == 0
Follower == 1
Candidate == 2

(* Initial state: all servers are followers with term 0 and no votes *)
Init == /\ currentTerm = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ votedFor = [i \in 1..N |-> NULL]
        /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> Follower]

(* Helper: majority threshold *)
Majority == N \div 2 + 1

(* Candidate requests votes from all servers *)
RequestVote ==
  /\ \E c \in 1..N : state[c] = Candidate
  /\ \A j \in 1..N : votedFor[j] = c
  /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
  /\ state' = state

(* Vote granted by a server if it hasn't voted yet in this term *)
GrantVote ==
  /\ \E i \in 1..N : state[i] = Follower
  /\ \E j \in 1..N : votedFor[j] = NULL
  /\ votedFor' = [votedFor EXCEPT ![j] = i]
  /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
  /\ state' = state

(* Leader steps: no state change, just a placeholder for leader actions *)
LeaderStep ==
  /\ \E i \in 1..N : state[i] = Leader
  /\ UNCHANGED <<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

(* Transition relation: any of the three actions can occur *)
Next == RequestVote \/ GrantVote \/ LeaderStep

(* Invariant: all servers have the same term *)
TypeOK == /\ currentTerm \in [1..N -> Nat]
          /\ votedFor \in [1..N -> {1..N} \cup {NULL}]
          /\ state \in [1..N -> {Leader, Follower, Candidate}]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

====

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANTS N \* number of reader processes

VARIABLES readers, writer_active, reader_waiting, writer_waiting

(* Initial state: no readers, no writer active, no waiting *)
Init == 
    /\ readers = 0
    /\ writer_active = FALSE
    /\ reader_waiting = {}
    /\ writer_waiting = {}

(* Reader enters if no writer is active and no writer is waiting *)
ReaderEnter(i) == 
    /\ i \in 1..N
    /\ reader_waiting = {} \cup {i}
    /\ reader_waiting' = reader_waiting \ {i}
    /\ readers' = readers + 1
    /\ UNCHANGED <<writer_active, writer_waiting>>

(* Reader exits *)
ReaderExit(i) == 
    /\ i \in 1..N
    /\ readers' = readers - 1
    /\ UNCHANGED <<writer_active, reader_waiting, writer_waiting>>

(* Writer enters if no readers and no writer active *)
WriterEnter(i) == 
    /\ i \in 1..N
    /\ writer_waiting = {} \cup {i}
    /\ writer_waiting' = writer_waiting \ {i}
    /\ writer_active' = TRUE
    /\ UNCHANGED <<readers, reader_waiting>>

(* Writer exits *)
WriterExit(i) == 
    /\ i \in 1..N
    /\ writer_active' = FALSE
    /\ UNCHANGED <<readers, reader_waiting, writer_waiting>>

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == 
    \/ \E i \in 1..N: ReaderEnter(i)
    \/ \E i \in 1..N: ReaderExit(i)
    \/ \E i \in 1..N: WriterEnter(i)
    \/ \E i \in 1..N: WriterExit(i)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active, reader_waiting, writer_waiting>>

(* Invariant: no reader and writer active simultaneously *)
TypeOK == 
    /\ readers \in Nat
    /\ writer_active \in BOOLEAN
    /\ reader_waiting \subseteq 1..N
    /\ writer_waiting \subseteq 1..N

name: Distributed Snapshot (Chandy-Lamport)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ChandyLamport ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANTS N, Proc, Chan

(* Each process is identified by a unique integer in Proc *)
(* Chan is the set of directed channels (p,q) where p,q in Proc *)

(* State of each process: a natural number representing its local state *)
VARIABLES procState, chanState, markerReceived, markerSent

(* State of each channel: a sequence of messages currently in transit *)

(* Marker sent flag: TRUE if a marker has been sent on a channel *)

(* Marker received flag: TRUE if a marker has been received on a channel *)

(* Initial state: all processes at state 0, all channels empty, no markers sent or received *)
Init == 
    /\ procState = [p \in Proc |-> 0]
    /\ chanState = [c \in Chan |-> <<>>]
    /\ markerSent = [c \in Chan |-> FALSE]
    /\ markerReceived = [c \in Chan |-> FALSE]

(* Helper to get source and destination of a channel *)
src(c) == FIRST c
dst(c) == LAST c

(* Sending a message from process p to process q *)
SendMsg(p, q, m) == 
    /\ procState[p] = m
    /\ chanState'[(p, q)] = Append(chanState[(p, q)], m)
    /\ UNCHANGED <<procState, markerSent, markerReceived>>

(* Receiving a message at process q from process p *)
RecvMsg(p, q) == 
    /\ chanState[(p, q)] ~= <<>>
    /\ m = Head(chanState[(p, q)])
    /\ procState'[q] = m
    /\ chanState'[(p, q)] = Tail(chanState[(p, q)])
    /\ UNCHANGED <<markerSent, markerReceived>>

(* Sending a marker from process p to process q *)
SendMarker(p, q) == 
    /\ markerSent'[(p, q)] = TRUE
    /\ chanState'[(p, q)] = Append(chanState[(p, q)], "marker")
    /\ UNCHANGED <<procState, markerReceived>>

(* Receiving a marker at process q from process p *)
RecvMarker(p, q) == 
    /\ markerReceived'[(p, q)] = TRUE
    /\ chanState'[(p, q)] = Tail(chanState[(p, q)])
    /\ UNCHANGED <<procState, markerSent>>

(* A process records its state if it has not yet recorded and receives a marker *)
RecordState(p) == 
    /\ ~Exists(q \in Proc : markerReceived[(q, p)])
    /\ procState'[p] = procState[p] + 1
    /\ UNCHANGED <<chanState, markerSent, markerReceived>>

(* Next-state relation: any process can send/receive messages or markers *)
Next == 
    \E p, q \in Proc :
        (SendMsg(p, q, procState[p]) \lor
         RecvMsg(p, q) \lor
         SendMarker(p, q) \lor
         RecvMarker(p, q) \lor
         RecordState(p))

(* Invariant: channel states are sequences of messages or markers *)
TypeOK == 
    /\ procState \in [Proc -> Nat]
    /\ chanState \in [Chan -> Seq({Nat)]
    /\ markerSent \in [Chan -> BOOLEAN]
    /\ markerReceived \in [Chan -> BOOLEAN]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<procState, chanState, markerSent, markerReceived>>

====

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES token, sent

(* TokenRing: A token ring network with N nodes. 
   Each node passes a single token clockwise. 
   Only the token holder may send a message. *)

(* Variables:
   token: the node currently holding the token (1..N)
   sent: set of nodes that have sent a message
*)

Init == 
    /\ token = 1
    /\ sent = {}

Next == 
    \E i \in 1..N :
        /\ token = i
        /\ token' = IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1
        /\ sent' = sent \cup {i}

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token, sent>>

====

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values

(* State variables *)
VARIABLE store

(* Helper: check that store is a function from Keys to Values *)
TypeOK == store \in [Keys -> Values]

(* Initial state: all keys map to a special initial value *)
Init == store = [k \in Keys |-> 0]

(* Action: Put(k, v) updates the store *)
Put(k, v) == /\ k \in Keys
              /\ v \in Values
              /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]

(* Action: Get(k) does not change the state *)
Get(k) == k \in Keys

(* Next-state relation: either a Put or a Get *)
Next == \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : Put(k, v) \/ Get(k)

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

====

name: Paxos Single-Decree
generated_spec:
---- MODULE PaxosSingleDecree ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, M, V
VARIABLES acceptors, proposers


(* Ballot numbers are natural numbers *)
Ballot == Nat

(* State of each acceptor: (promised, acceptedBallot, acceptedValue) *)
State == [promised: Ballot, acceptedBallot: Ballot, acceptedValue: V]

(* Global state *)
vars == <<proposers, acceptors>>

(* Initial state: no promises or accepts *)
Init == /\ proposers = [p \in 1..M |-> 0]
        /\ acceptors = [a \in 1..N |-> [promised |-> 0,
                                         acceptedBallot |-> 0,
                                         acceptedValue |-> CHOOSE V]]

(* Proposer p proposes value v with ballot b *)
Propose(p, v, b) ==
  /\ proposers' = [proposers EXCEPT ![p] = b]
  /\ acceptors' = acceptors

(* Prepare phase: proposer p sends prepare to all acceptors *)
Prepare(p, b) ==
  /\ \A a \in 1..N: acceptors[a].promised <= b
  /\ acceptors' = [acceptors EXCEPT ![a].promised = b]

(* Promise phase: acceptor a promises to proposer p with highest accepted *)
Promise(a, p, b) ==
  /\ acceptors[a].promised = b
  /\ acceptors' = acceptors

(* Accept phase: proposer p sends accept to all acceptors with value v *)
Accept(p, v, b) ==
  /\ \A a \in 1..N: acceptors[a].acceptedBallot <= b
  /\ acceptors' = [acceptors EXCEPT ![a].acceptedBallot = b,
                                   ![a].acceptedValue = v]

(* Accepted phase: acceptor a accepts value v from proposer p *)
Accepted(a, p, v, b) ==
  /\ acceptors[a].acceptedBallot = b
  /\ acceptors' = acceptors

(* One step of the protocol *)
Next ==
  \E p \in 1..M : \E v \in V : \E b \in Ballot :
    Propose(p, v, b) \/ Prepare(p, b) \/ Promise(1, p, b) \/ Accept(p, v, b) \/ Accepted(1, p, v, b)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

====

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS File, MAX_RETRIES

(* File is a sequence of chunks, each chunk is a natural number *)
CHUNKS == Len(File)

VARIABLES sent, acked, retrans, lost

(* sent: set of indices of chunks that have been sent
   acked: set of indices of chunks that have been acknowledged
   retrans: mapping from chunk index to number of retransmissions attempted
   lost: set of indices of chunks currently lost (not delivered) *)

Init ==
    sent = {} /\ acked = {} /\ retrans = [i \in 1..CHUNKS |-> 0] /\ lost = {}

Send(i) ==
    i \in 1..CHUNKS /\ i \notin sent /\ i \notin acked /\ retrans[i] < MAX_RETRIES
    /\ sent' = sent \cup {i}
    /\ retrans' = [retrans EXCEPT ![i] = @ + 1]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<acked, lost>>

Deliver(i) ==
    i \in sent /\ i \notin acked
    /\ i \notin lost
    /\ acked' = acked \cup {i}
    /\ UNCHANGED <<sent, retrans, lost>>

Lose(i) ==
    i \in sent /\ i \notin acked
    /\ i \in lost
    /\ UNCHANGED <<sent, acked, retrans>>

Drop(i) ==
    i \in sent /\ i \notin acked
    /\ i \notin lost
    /\ lost' = lost \cup {i}
    /\ UNCHANGED <<sent, acked, retrans>>

Recover(i) ==
    i \in lost
    /\ lost' = lost \ {i}
    /\ UNCHANGED <<sent, acked, retrans>>

Next ==
    \E i \in 1..CHUNKS :
        Send(i) \/ Deliver(i) \/ Lose(i) \/ Drop(i) \/ Recover(i)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<sent, acked, retrans, lost>>

====

name: Transaction Isolation (Snapshot Isolation)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE SnapshotIsolation ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Rec, Attr, Val, Txn

\* State variables
VARIABLES db,          \* Current committed database: [Rec -> [Attr -> Val]], aborted, active, committed, snapshot, t, transaction, writes
           snapshot,    \* Snapshot seen by each active transaction: [Txn -> [Rec -> [Attr -> Val]]]
           active,      \* Set of active (started but not yet committed/aborted) transactions
           writes,      \* Pending writes: [Txn -> [Rec -> [Attr -> Val]]]
           committed,   \* Set of committed transaction identifiers
           aborted,     \* Set of aborted transaction identifiers

\* Helper: all records in the database
AllRecs == Rec

\* Helper: all attributes in a record
AllAttrs(r) == Attr

\* Helper: initial database: all attributes of all records set to 0
InitDB == \A r \in Rec: \A a \in Attr: db[r][a] = 0

\* Initial state: empty transaction sets, no pending writes, empty snapshots, and initial database
Init == /\ db = [r \in Rec |-> [a \in Attr |-> 0]]
        /\ active = {}
        /\ writes = [t \in Txn |-> [r \in Rec |-> [a \in Attr |-> 0]]]
        /\ snapshot = [t \in Txn |-> [r \in Rec |-> [a \in Attr |-> 0]]]
        /\ committed = {}
        /\ aborted = {}

\* Transaction start: pick a new transaction id not yet used, add to active set, and capture a snapshot of the current database
Start(t) == /\ t \notin active
            /\ t \notin committed
            /\ t \notin aborted
            /\ active' = active \cup {t}
            /\ snapshot' = [snapshot EXCEPT ![t] = [r \in Rec |-> [a \in Attr |-> db[r][a]]]]
            /\ UNCHANGED <<db, writes, committed, aborted>>

\* Transaction read: read the value of attribute a of record r from the transaction's snapshot
Read(t, r, a) == /\ t \in active
                 /\ r \in Rec
                 /\ a \in Attr
                 /\ \E v \in Val: db[r][a] = v

\* Transaction write: record a pending write of value v to record r in the transaction's write set
Write(t, r, a, v) == /\ t \in active
                    /\ r \in Rec
                    /\ a \in Attr
                    /\ v \in Val
                    /\ writes' = [writes EXCEPT ![t][r][a] = v]
                    /\ UNCHANGED <<db, snapshot, active, committed, aborted>>

\* Transaction commit: apply all pending writes to the database if no write-write conflict exists
Commit(t) == /\ t \in active
              /\ \A r \in Rec: \A a \in Attr:
                 \E t' \in active \ {t} :
                    writes[t'][r][a] # writes[t][r][a] -> FALSE
              /\ db' = [db EXCEPT ![r][a] = writes[t][r][a] |
                         r \in Rec, a \in Attr]
              /\ active' = active \ {t}
              /\ writes' = [writes EXCEPT ![t] = [r \in Rec |-> [a \in Attr |-> 0]]]
              /\ committed' = committed \cup {t}
              /\ UNCHANGED <<snapshot, aborted>>

\* Transaction abort: discard all pending writes and remove the transaction from the active set
Abort(t) == /\ t \in active
             /\ writes' = [writes EXCEPT ![t] = [r \in Rec |-> [a \in Attr |-> 0]]]
             /\ active' = active \ {t}
             /\ aborted' = aborted \cup {t}
             /\ UNCHANGED <<db, snapshot, committed>>

\* Next-state relation: any of the following actions may occur
Next == \E t \in Txn:
          Start(t) \/ Read(t, CHOOSE r \in Rec: TRUE, CHOOSE a \in Attr: TRUE) \/ 
          Write(t, CHOOSE r \in Rec: TRUE, CHOOSE a \in Attr: TRUE, CHOOSE v \in Val: TRUE) \/ 
          Commit(t) \/ Abort(t)

\* Specification: initial state and all reachable states
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<db, snapshot, active, writes, committed, aborted>>

\* Type correctness invariant
TypeOK == /\ db \in [Rec -> [Attr -> Val]]
           /\ snapshot \in [Txn -> [Rec -> [Attr -> Val]]]
           /\ active \in SUBSET Txn
           /\ writes \in [Txn -> [Rec -> [Attr -> Val]]]
           /\ committed \in SUBSET Txn
           /\ aborted \in SUBSET Txn

====

name: Clock Synchronisation
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ClockSync ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, epsilon

(* Variables: *)
VARIABLES clocks, offsets

(* Helper: *)
Avg(c) == (SUM i \in 1..N : c[i]) \div N

(* Initial state: *)
Init == /\ clocks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ offsets = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]

(* One round of synchronization: *)
Step == 
  \E i \in 1..N :
    LET newVal == Avg(clocks)
    IN /\ clocks' = [clocks EXCEPT ![i] = newVal]
        /\ offsets' = offsets

(* Next-state relation: *)
Next == Step

(* Specification: *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<clocks, offsets>>

name: Peterson's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Peterson ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANTS P1, P2

VARIABLES flag, turn

(* State space: flag is a 2-element sequence of booleans,
   turn is either P1 or P2. *)

Init == /\ flag = <<FALSE, FALSE>>
        /\ turn = P1

Next ==
  \/ (* Process 1 enters critical section *)
     /\ flag[1] = FALSE
     /\ flag' = <<TRUE, flag[2]>>
     /\ turn' = P2
     /\ UNCHANGED <<flag[2], turn>>
  \/ (* Process 2 enters critical section *)
     /\ flag[2] = FALSE
     /\ flag' = <<flag[1], TRUE>>
     /\ turn' = P1
     /\ UNCHANGED <<flag[1], turn>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

name: Gossip Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Gossip ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Nodes

(* Each node is identified by an integer in 1..N *)
NodeSet == 1..N

(* State: for each node, a set of messages it knows *)
VARIABLES known

(* Initial state: no node knows any message *)
Init == known = [i \in NodeSet |-> {}]

(* Helper: a node i chooses a random neighbor j (j != i) *)
ChooseNeighbor(i) == CHOOSE j \in NodeSet : j # i

(* Helper: node i sends all its known messages to neighbor j *)
Send(i, j) == 
  LET msgs == known[i] IN
  /\ known' = [k \in NodeSet |-> IF k = j THEN known[k] \cup msgs ELSE known[k]]

(* One round of gossip: each node picks a neighbor and sends its knowledge *)
Round == 
  \E i \in NodeSet :
    LET j == ChooseNeighbor(i) IN
    Send(i, j)

(* Next-state relation: one round of gossip *)
Next == Round

(* Spec: execution of the protocol *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_known

(* Invariant: all known sets are subsets of the universe of messages *)
TypeOK == \A i \in NodeSet : known[i] \subseteq 1..N

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MemoryAllocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N
CONSTANT Clients

Pages == 1..N

VARIABLES free, allocated

Init == /\ free = Pages
        /\ allocated = [c \in Clients |-> {}]

Request(c, p) == /\ p \in free
                 /\ free' = free \ {p}
                 /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \cup {p}]

Release(c, p) == /\ p \in allocated[c]
                /\ free' = free \cup {p}
                /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \ {p}]

Next == \E c \in Clients : \E p \in Pages :
          Request(c, p) \/ Release(c, p)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

name: Publish-Subscribe Broker
generated_spec:
---- MODULE PubSubBroker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Topics, Subscribers, Messages

(* State variables *)
VARIABLES subscriptions, inboxes, pending
IsValidState ==
    /\ subscriptions \in [Topics -> SUBSET Subscribers]
    /\ inboxes \in [Subscribers -> Seq(Messages)]
    /\ pending \in Seq(Topic \X Messages)

(* Initial state: no subscriptions, empty inboxes, no pending messages *)
Init ==
    /\ subscriptions = [t \in Topics |-> {}]
    /\ inboxes = [s \in Subscribers |-> <<>>]
    /\ pending = <<>>

(* Action: a subscriber registers for a topic *)
Register(sub, topic) ==
    /\ sub \in Subscribers
    /\ topic \in Topics
    /\ subscriptions'[topic] = subscriptions[topic] \cup {sub}
    /\ UNCHANGED <<inboxes, pending>>

(* Action: a publisher posts a message to a topic *)
Publish(msg, topic) ==
    /\ msg \in Messages
    /\ topic \in Topics
    /\ pending' = Append(pending, <<topic, msg>>)
    /\ UNCHANGED <<subscriptions, inboxes>>

(* Action: broker delivers the next pending message to all subscribers *)
Deliver ==
    /\ pending # <<>>
    /\ LET
           head == Head(pending)
           topic == Fst(head)
           msg == Snd(head)
       IN
           /\ inboxes' = [s \in Subscribers |
                           IF s \in subscriptions[topic]
                           THEN Append(inboxes[s], msg)

           /\ pending' = Tail(pending)
           /\ subscriptions' = subscriptions

Next ==
    \/ \E sub \in Subscribers : \E topic \in Topics : Register(sub, topic)
    \/ \E msg \in Messages : \E topic \in Topics : Publish(msg, topic)
    \/ Deliver

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<subscriptions, inboxes, pending>>

(* Invariant: each message appears in the inbox of every subscriber who
   was subscribed at the time the message was published. *)
TypeOK ==
    /\ subscriptions \in [Topics -> SUBSET Subscribers]
    /\ inboxes \in [Subscribers -> Seq(Messages)]
    /\ pending \in Seq(Topic \X Messages)

name: Dekker's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Dekker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANTS P1, P2

VARIABLES turn, wants

(* turn ∈ {P1, P2} *)
(* wants ∈ [P1 -> BOOLEAN, P2 -> BOOLEAN] *)

Init == 
    /\ turn = P1
    /\ wants = [P1 |-> FALSE, P2 |-> FALSE]

Next == 
    \E p \in {P1, P2} :
        LET q == IF p = P1 THEN P2 ELSE P1 IN
        /\ wants[p] = FALSE
        /\ wants[q] = FALSE
        /\ turn = p
        /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![p] = TRUE]
        \/ (wants[p] = TRUE /\ wants[q] = FALSE /\ turn' = p)
        \/ (wants[p] = TRUE /\ wants[q] = TRUE /\ turn' = q)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants>>

Safety == 
    \A p, q \in {P1, P2} :
        p /= q => ~(wants[p] /\ wants[q])

Liveness == 
    \A p \in {P1, P2} :
        []<>(wants[p] = FALSE)

name: Eventually Consistent Counter
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GCounter ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANTS N, Nodes

(* Each node has a vector of counters, one per node *)
VARIABLES counts

(* Initial state: all counters zero *)
Init == counts = [i \in Nodes |-> [j \in Nodes |-> 0]]

(* Increment operation at node i *)
Inc(i) ==
  /\ i \in Nodes
  /\ counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![i][i] = @ + 1]

(* Merge operation between nodes i and j: element-wise max *)
Merge(i, j) ==
  /\ i \in Nodes /\ j \in Nodes
  /\ counts' = [k \in Nodes |
                 [l \in Nodes |-> Max(counts[i][l], counts[j][l])]]

(* Next-state relation: any node may increment or merge with any other *)
Next == \E i \in Nodes : Inc(i) \/ \E j \in Nodes : Merge(i, j)

(* Total count is sum of maximums of each column *)
Total == \Sum n \in Nodes : Max(\{ counts[i][n] : i \in Nodes \})

(* Invariant: all counters are nonnegative integers *)
TypeOK == \A i, j \in Nodes : counts[i][j] \in Nat

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_counts
